/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/NuclearConflict.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NuclearConflict.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NuclearConflict.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NuclearConflict.dir/src/UIRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NuclearConflict.dir/src/ParticleSystem.cpp.o -o NuclearConflict  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so
